_help.import.queueConcurrency: how many ZIP imports run DB work at once (keep 1 to avoid per-table lock contention on large tables)
_help.import.queueCapacity: max ZIPs allowed in the queue at once (running + pending)
_help.import.userMaxZips: max ZIPs one user can select in a single upload
_help.import.staleMinutes: minimum age (minutes) before an orphaned pending/processing row (no queue file, no active worker) is marked not_complate
